rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. HAYLEE YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Haylee Yee And Suzanne Yee'S Motion To Vacate, Dissolve, Or Modify Receivership Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 18, 2013, line 5. Defendants Haylee Yee And Suzanne Yee's Motion To Vacate, Dissolve, Or Modify Receivership Order DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. Moving party moves to dissolve/modify receivership based on new circumstance - availability of $114,000. Based on the estimation provided in support of Defendants' motion remediation will require $125,000-$150,000, not including cost of repairing back staircase at 615 Minna. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. HAYLEE YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Receiver E. Lynn Schienmann'S Motion For Approval Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 615 Minna Street, San Francisco, Subject To Overbid.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 18, 2013, line 5. Receiver E. Lynn Schienmann's Motion For Approval Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 615 Minna Street, San Francisco, Subject To Overbid. Supplemental briefing is required to provide repair estimates tethered to specific NOVs. Both parties to submit briefs, not exceeding 5 pages, excluding contractor declarations no later than August 9, 2013. Plaintiff shall allow Defendant's contractor, if any, to inspect relevant portions of the premises. Hearing is set for August 19, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KOBRA NOURI VS. BANK OF AMERICA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Bank Of America, N.A.'S Motion To Dismiss Case With Prejudice For Plaintiff'S Failure To File An Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 18, 2013, line 1. Defendant Bank Of America, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Case With Prejudice For Plaintiff's Failure To File An Amended Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. No amended complaint on file. = (501/REQ)
